original: You flip the protective cap off the end of the hypospray and settle it quickly against your arm. A quick thumb of the button and the microsurgeons surge into your bloodstream near instantaneously, a distinct feeling of power coursing through your veins as they spread throughout your body.
You are about to pull out a stimbooster, but "+({var0}()?{var1}.getCombatName():{var2}+{var3})+" wouldn’t be able to make use of it!

original: Using the stimbooster without need would be pretty wasteful....

You pull out a stimbooster and toss it to "+({var0}()?{var1}.getCombatName():{var2}+{var3})+". They quickly pop off the cap and press the business end to their body. In mere seconds "+({var4}()?{var5}.getCombatName():{var6}+{var7})+" look far perkier, the microsurgeons working quickly to dull the pain and weariness from their frame.
